title: Huizhou, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Huizhou, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Huizhou is a city in Guangdong with a population of 6,042,000. A coastal city in Guangdong known for West Lake, beautiful beaches, and a growing electronics and petrochemical industry.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
